sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n23080" key="gupogi/gas" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῡπο-γίγας</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">αντος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in pl., 'men of prey', <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Procl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
